2026-04-24T08:24:20.9212581Z     # Lamb Shank × Braise — Recipe Temperature Research
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9212832Z     
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9213103Z     ## Tree position
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9213355Z     
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9213581Z     | Field | Value |
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9213842Z     |-------|-------|
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9214103Z     | Category | `lamb` |
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9214554Z     | Cut type folder | `roasts/` |
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9214870Z     | Cut slug | `lamb_shank` |
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9215183Z     | Method slug | `braise` |
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9215521Z     | File | `lamb_shank-braise.md` |
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9216217Z     | Full path | `docs/recipe_research/lamb/roasts/lamb_shank-braise.md` |
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9216761Z     
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9217008Z     ## Cut profile
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9217258Z     
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9217810Z     The lamb shank is the lower portion of the leg — the section below the knee joint on either
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9218531Z     the fore (front) or hind (back) leg. It contains a central bone surrounded by a dense network
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9219276Z     of collagen-rich connective tissue, which transforms into gelatin during prolonged moist-heat
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9219981Z     cooking and gives braised lamb shank its characteristic sticky, unctuous sauce and
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9220677Z     fall-off-the-bone texture. The shank has relatively little intramuscular fat compared with
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9221416Z     the shoulder but abundant surface and inter-muscular fat that melts into the braising liquid.
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9222183Z     Because of the high collagen content, the shank is uniquely unsuited to dry-heat methods
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9222902Z     — it must reach 85–95 °C internal temperature and be held there for 2–4 hours for collagen
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9223468Z     conversion to complete. Any reading below 80 °C will leave the meat tough regardless of cooking
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9225012Z     time. This makes the MEATER probe essential for monitoring approach to the braising window;
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9225599Z     the pull temperature is the **minimum** at which the meat has rendered sufficiently, not a
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9226095Z     precision target. The shank is universal across Mediterranean, Middle Eastern, Northern European,
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9226592Z     Central Asian, and Indian culinary traditions. Braising liquid varies from red or white wine
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9227098Z     (European), beer (Belgian/Scandinavian), cider (Norman/Swedish), saffron-tomato (Persian/Moroccan),
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9227551Z     to spiced yoghurt or lentil-thickened broth (Indian/Turkish).
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9227834Z     
2026-04-24T08:24:20.9228007Z     ## Source recipes

2026-04-24T08:25:05.8053846Z     # Recipe Source Survey — Network Accessibility from Copilot Cloud Sandbox
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8054489Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8054954Z     **Purpose:** This document records the results of systematic web_fetch probing of global
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8055727Z     recipe websites from the Copilot cloud agent sandbox. Each site was probed directly with
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8056536Z     a relevant recipe URL to determine whether real recipe content (ingredients + method steps)
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8057310Z     is accessible. This prevents agents wasting time on blocked or misdirecting sites.
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8057848Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8058123Z     **Last updated:** 2026-04-24
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8058598Z     **Agent session:** v0.6.1.x — implement-phase-8
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8058993Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8059251Z     ---
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8059727Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8060023Z     ## Background and problem history
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8060387Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8060861Z     Previous agents (pre-v0.6.1.x) attempted to use web_fetch on a wide range of recipe sites
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8061462Z     and received unreliable results:
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8061812Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8062248Z     - Many sites returned HTTP 402 / 403 / 404 without the agent registering the failure.
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8062993Z     - Some sites connected but returned the wrong recipe (the homepage or a different recipe).
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8063678Z     - Some sites connected but returned a user profile/bio page instead of a recipe.
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8064443Z     - The agent fabricated recipe content from training-data memory and passed it off as
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8065143Z       fetched content, violating the integrity rules in RECIPE_COLLECTION_TOR.md.
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8065653Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8066078Z     The rule in this project is: **do not write content you cannot cite to a real URL or
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8066797Z     a real published book**. Training-data recall of "what a recipe roughly contains" is
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8067513Z     not an acceptable source. Use web_fetch to verify you can actually read the content.
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8068038Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:05.8068296Z     ---

2026-04-24T08:25:20.5424619Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:20.5425907Z     Lamb shank is a cut of meat that comes from the well-exercised lower section of the lamb leg. It’s a tougher, more budget-friendly portion of the lamb, but it is also one of the most flavorful. It greatly rewards patience: Simmer it slowly, and it will become fall-off the bone tender and so deliciously rich.
2026-04-24T08:25:20.5426806Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:20.5428332Z     For this lamb shank recipe, I drew inspiration from classics like [Persian Mahiche](https://www.themediterraneandish.com/persian-braised-lamb-shanks-mahiche/) and [Moroccan Tagine](https://www.themediterraneandish.com/moroccan-lamb-stew-recipe/) for the seasoning blend. Lamb’s richness really shines with warming spices like cinnamon and nutmeg. As a bonus, it will make your house smell incredible!
2026-04-24T08:25:20.5430203Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:20.5432644Z     If you’d like a stress-free holiday or a dinner party, this easy recipe is your answer. You can make it the night before, it’s nearly impossible to mess up, and it brings all the fancy festive vibes to the party. Serve with something to soak up the delicious sauce, like [Lebanese rice](https://www.themediterraneandish.com/lebanese-rice-with-vermicelli/), [creamy polenta](https://www.themediterraneandish.com/polenta-recipe/), or cooked orzo pasta.
2026-04-24T08:25:20.5434864Z

2026-04-24T08:25:34.6087843Z     ## Method
2026-04-24T08:25:34.6088047Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:34.6088257Z     *   ### step 1
2026-04-24T08:25:34.6088488Z         
2026-04-24T08:25:34.6089313Z         Heat oven to 200C/fan 180C/gas 6. Pour the oil in a casserole dish or roasting tray large enough to fit all the shanks. With the pan set over a high heat on the hob, spend a good 10 mins browning the lamb all over.
2026-04-24T08:25:34.6090190Z         
2026-04-24T08:25:34.6090397Z     *   ### step 2
2026-04-24T08:25:34.6090633Z         
2026-04-24T08:25:34.6091743Z         Remove the lamb, add the onion and carrot and cook for 10 mins until starting to brown. Stir in the herbs and garlic and cook for a few mins more. Stir in the flour and tomato purée, season well then pour over the wine and stock.
2026-04-24T08:25:34.6093291Z         
2026-04-24T08:25:34.6093513Z     *   ### step 3
2026-04-24T08:25:34.6093745Z         
2026-04-24T08:25:34.6094886Z         Return the lamb shanks to the pan. Bring to a simmer, cover with a lid or tightly with foil and cook in the oven, undisturbed, for 1½-2 hrs until lamb is tender. Remove the lamb from the sauce and set aside.
2026-04-24T08:25:34.6095749Z         
2026-04-24T08:25:34.6095970Z     *   ### step 4
2026-04-24T08:25:34.6096196Z         
2026-04-24T08:25:34.6097292Z         Put pan back on the hob and bubble the sauce down for about 15 mins until rich and glossy. Pass through a sieve into a jug. The lamb and sauce can be stored in the fridge for two days or frozen for one month. To serve, reheat the lamb in the sauce, adding a splash of water if the sauce is too thick.
2026-04-24T08:25:34.6098480Z

2026-04-24T08:25:35.0701212Z     Contents of https://www.thewoksoflife.com/cumin-lamb/:
2026-04-24T08:25:35.0701935Z     ![Cumin Lamb, by thewoksoflife.com](https://thewoksoflife.com/wp-content/uploads/2015/08/cumin-lamb-2.jpg)
2026-04-24T08:25:35.0702620Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:35.0705218Z     Cumin lamb is a Xinjiang (新疆) dish, similar to [_Yang Rou Chuan_](https://thewoksoflife.com/2014/06/spicy-beijing-lamb-skewers-yangrou-chuan/ "Spicy Beijing Lamb Skewers (Yangrou Chuan)") (grilled lamb skewers). Like the wildly popular (and delicious) _chuan_, it has gone beyond Xinjiang to become a popular dish all over China. I’ve seen it most often at authentic Hunan, Sichuan, and Chinese halal restaurants.
2026-04-24T08:25:35.0707512Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:35.0709207Z     It’s really not difficult to see why cumin lamb, flavored with whole cumin seeds, has become such a popular dish. Cumin and lamb is a flavor match made in heaven. Add some hot peppers and plenty of cilantro, and it’s a dish too perfect to ignore. With white rice…I’ll use a phrase that Bill and the girls taught me over the years: Daaaaaaaang.
2026-04-24T08:25:35.0710575Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:35.0712127Z     As a matter of fact, cumin lamb is one of my mother’s favorite dishes, and she usually doesn’t even like lamb. That’s how good it is. Fun fact, most Shanghainese people don’t like lamb—I used to be one of them, I’m ashamed to admit. You will never find any lamb dish in a Shanghainese restaurant.
2026-04-24T08:25:35.0713529Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:35.0715628Z     That said, I really don’t know why that’s the case. According to TCM (Traditional Chinese Medicine), lamb’s benefits include: expelling dampness from the body, warming the blood, and improving your overall Qi. Not surprising, then, that the best time to eat lamb is in the autumn and winter. So as summer comes to a close, what better time to post this recipe?
2026-04-24T08:25:35.0726464Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:35.0728209Z     One last point I want to make: the trick to a good cumin lamb is the _lamb fat_. Hear me out. Overly lean lamb just tastes tough and unpleasant. The addition of a little extra marbling makes all the difference in the flavor and savory quality of the dish. I used leg of lamb, which ended up being a bit too lean. Most recipes will tell you to use leg of lamb, but I think the shoulder cut is better. Whatever you do, find a way to get some lamb fat in the dish.
2026-04-24T08:25:35.0729985Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:35.0730542Z     ![Cumin Lamb, by thewoksoflife.com](https://thewoksoflife.com/wp-content/uploads/2015/08/cumin-lamb-3.jpg)
2026-04-24T08:25:35.0731131Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:35.0731396Z     ## Cumin Lamb Recipe Instructions
2026-04-24T08:25:35.0731715Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:35.0734407Z     Pad lamb dry with paper towel before cutting. Once cut, combine the lamb with the marinade ingredients in a bowl—[cumin](https://thewoksoflife.com/chinese-spices-condiments/#cumin-seeds) powder, [cornstarch](https://thewoksoflife.com/rice-grains-and-flours/#cornstarch), oil, [light soy sauce](https://thewoksoflife.com/chinese-sauces-vinegars-oils/), and [Shaoxing wine](https://thewoksoflife.com/chinese-sauces-vinegars-oils/#shaoxing). Set aside and marinate for 30 minutes.
2026-04-24T08:25:35.0736539Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:35.0738161Z     Once the lamb has been marinated, heat a [wok](https://thewoksoflife.com/how-to/chinese-cooking-tools/) over medium heat. Add the [cumin seeds](https://thewoksoflife.com/chinese-spices-condiments/#cumin-seeds) to the wok and dry toast them until fragrant. Turn off the heat, remove the cumin from the wok, and set aside.
2026-04-24T08:25:35.0739607Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:35.0739966Z     ![Cumin Lamb, by thewoksoflife.com](https://thewoksoflife.com/wp-
2026-04-24T08:25:35.0740402Z

2026-04-24T08:25:50.1515341Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:50.1515533Z     **5** Deneyen Fotoğrafı
2026-04-24T08:25:50.1515732Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:50.1516168Z     1.  Öncelikle incikleri mühürleyelim (çok az yağda her iki tarafı kızartalım, suyu ve lezzeti içinde kalır)
2026-04-24T08:25:50.1516690Z     2.  Sonra üzerine sıcak su ilave ederek haşlamaya bırakalım.
2026-04-24T08:25:50.1517053Z     3.  40 dk kadar haşlandıktan sonra çatalla kontrol edelim.
2026-04-24T08:25:50.1517453Z     4.  Yumuşamışsa patates, havuç, soğan, tuz ve tane karabiberi ekleyelim.
2026-04-24T08:25:50.1518095Z     5.  Yaklaşık 15 dk daha haşlayalım.
2026-04-24T08:25:50.1518442Z     6.  Sonrasında etler kızarana kadar fırınlayalım. Afiyet olsun.
2026-04-24T08:25:50.1518734Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:50.1518985Z     Not; haşlama işlemi için düdüklü tencere kullandım.
2026-04-24T08:25:50.1519229Z

2026-04-24T08:25:50.1521004Z     *   Etleri düdüklü tencerede haşlamayacaksanız pişirme süresi kısık ateşte 1 saati bulabilir.

2026-04-24T08:25:53.2111818Z     ## Nem opskrift på lammeskank i rødvin, og den giver noget helt fantastisk mørt kød. Lammeskankerne langtidssteges i to en halv time i gryde.
2026-04-24T08:25:53.2112904Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:53.2113381Z     Lammeskank er lækker mad, der er fortrinlig som gæstemad og weekendmad.
2026-04-24T08:25:53.2113838Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:53.2114628Z     Lammeskanken indeholder en del sener og bindevæv, og derfor skal den tilberedes over længere tid.
2026-04-24T08:25:53.2115205Z     
2026-04-24T08:25:53.2115856Z     Til gengæld er der masser af smag i kødet, og derfor er det genialt at langtidsstege lammeskanken sammen med rødvin.
2026-04-24T08:25:53.2116415Z

2026-04-24T08:26:07.8114812Z     ## Εκτέλεση
2026-04-24T08:26:07.8114982Z     
2026-04-24T08:26:07.8115237Z     1.  Προθερμαίνουμε το φούρνο στους 220°C στον αέρα.
2026-04-24T08:26:07.8115773Z     2.  Πλένουμε, καθαρίζουμε και κόβουμε τα πράσα και τα κρεμμύδια σε χοντρές φέτες.
2026-04-24T08:26:07.8116256Z     3.  Στεγνώνουμε τα κότσια με απορροφητικό χαρτί, τα ραντίζουμε με ελάχιστο ελαιόλαδο και τα καρυκεύουμε με αλάτι και πιπέρι.
2026-04-24T08:26:07.8116933Z     4.  Ζεσταίνουμε σε μια φαρδιά και ρηχή κατσαρόλα και σε μέτρια προς δυνατή φωτιά το υπόλοιπο ελαιόλαδο και ροδίζουμε σε δόσεις τα κότσια για 3-4 λεπτά, βγάζοντας όσα είναι έτοιμα σε μικρή γάστρα.
2026-04-24T08:26:07.8117605Z     5.  Όταν τελειώσουμε με το κρέας, σοτάρουμε στο ίδιο σκεύος τα πράσα, τα κρεμμύδια, το θυμάρι, τη ρίγανη και το σκόρδο για 4-5 λεπτά ανακατεύοντας.
2026-04-24T08:26:07.8118067Z     6.  Πασπαλίζουμε με το αλεύρι και συνεχίζουμε το σοτάρισμα για 1-2 λεπτά.
2026-04-24T08:26:07.8118426Z     7.  Σβήνουμε με το κρασί και μόλις πάρει βράση, προσθέτουμε το ζωμό.
2026-04-24T08:26:07.8118884Z     8.  Βάζουμε τα μικρά καρότα ολόκληρα στη γάστρα γύρω από τα κότσια και περιχύνουμε με τα υλικά της κατσαρόλας.
2026-04-24T08:26:07.8119309Z     9.  Σκεπάζουμε το σκεύος και το μεταφέρουμε στη μεσαία σχάρα του φούρνου.

2026-04-24T08:26:46.5692479Z     Mahiche, Persian Braised Lamb Shanks, is a celebratory dish where lamb slowly simmers with warm spices, saffron, and a medley of aromatic vegetables until it’s fall-off-the-bone tender. Every bite is rich, flavorful, and perfect for serving over fluffy Persian dill rice. 
2026-04-24T08:26:46.5693271Z     
2026-04-24T08:26:46.5694497Z     Mahiche, which is the Persian word for shanks, in this recipe refers to Persian Braised Lamb Shanks, a dish that embodies warmth and tradition. The shanks braise for hours with onions, garlic, turmeric, cinnamon, and saffron, creating a deep, rich gravy that infuses every bite with bold flavor. The slow cooking process ensures the lamb is irresistibly tender, and yields a fragrant sauce perfect for spooning over a bed of fluffy rice.

2026-04-24T08:27:22.7817641Z     
2026-04-24T08:27:22.7817817Z     ## About Rogan Josh
2026-04-24T08:27:22.7818009Z     
2026-04-24T08:27:22.7819530Z     Absolutely phenomenal in taste and texture, Rogan josh, the deep red spicy meat curry, is the signature dish of Kashmir and is an integral part of the lavish Kashmiri food spread known as “Wazwaan”. In fact, this multi-course meal is one which you should be tasting at least once in your life since the dishes are so lip-smacking and delicious.
2026-04-24T08:27:22.7820482Z     
2026-04-24T08:27:22.7821512Z     There are various interpretations of the name which I learnt. Rogan, pronounced as “roughan” means “oil or ghee” in Persian. While in Urdu, it may mean “brown or red”. On the other hand, “Josh” (jus) refers “to braise” or “stew”. Other meaning may be the intense heat. So Rogan josh may mean one that is “stewed or braised in ghee”.
2026-04-24T08:27:22.7822367Z

2026-04-24T08:27:25.1491131Z     1.  Step
2026-04-24T08:27:25.1491366Z         
2026-04-24T08:27:25.1491607Z         1
2026-04-24T08:27:25.1491839Z         
2026-04-24T08:27:25.1495609Z         Cut greens away from beets, leaving about ¼ inch of stems. Scrub beets with vegetable brush. To steam beets, place in a steamer above 2 inches water. Bring to a boil over high heat and cover. Turn down heat to medium. Steam small and medium beets for 30 minutes and large beets for 40 minutes, until you can pierce the beet to the middle with a knife or skewer. Remove from heat and allow to cool. To roast, preheat oven to 425ºF and place beets in a baking dish (or lidded ovenproof casserole). Add ¼ inch water to the dish. Cover tightly. Place in the oven and roast small beets (3 ounces or less) for 30 to 40 minutes, medium beets (4 to 6 ounces) 40 to 45 minutes, and large beets (8 ounces) 50 to 60 minutes, until they are easily penetrated with the tip of a knife. Remove from the oven and allow to cool in the covered baking dish.
2026-04-24T08:27:25.1498474Z

Can substitute lamb shanks if desired【3:2†source】.\n\n- **Asun (Spicy Roast Goat, 2025 update)**: Nigerian party favorite featuring broiled or grilled, fall-off-the-bone spicy goat, sautéed with onions, habanero, bell peppers, and aromatic spices. Served with plantains. Traditionally made with smoked goat, but instructions for using fresh are provided【3:3†source】.\n\n- **Instant Pot Curry Goat (2021)**: Quick, one-pot version for tender, flavorful curry goat with tomato paste, scotch bonnet, thyme, and potatoes. Modern take for easy home celebrations (works for holidays, too)【3:5†source】.\n\n### Lamb & Mutton Recipes\n\n- **Slow Cooker Lamb Stew (2023)**: Comforting, hearty stew with lamb, onions, garlic, carrots, mushrooms, potatoes, thyme, smoked paprika, and tomato paste. Easy set-and-forget recipe for tender, flavorful lamb【3:1†source】.\n\n- **Grilled Lamb Chops (2026 update)**: Marinate lamb rib chops with rosemary, garlic, olive oil, and herbs, then grill for a juicy, smoky finish. Optional peppercorn sauce included. Tips for doneness and make-ahead marinating【3:7†source】.\n\n- **Lamb Loin Chops (2023)**: Elegant, herby lamb chops, seared then oven-braised with veggies, rosemary, thyme, tomato paste, dry wine, Worcestershire, and broth. Produces fall-off-the-bone tender chops perfect for special dinners【3:8†source】.\n\n- **Slow Cooker Lamb Leg (2021)**: Succulent lamb leg slow-cooked with creole seasoning, garlic, rosemary, and wine. Minimal prep, well-browned with a crispy exterior—a great centerpiece for holidays or Sunday dinner【3:6†source】.\n\nYou can find all these recipes with step-by-step instructions, photos, and tips on AfricanBites.com’s respective pages, or browse their [Lamb Recipe archive](https://www.africanbites.com/category/recipes/lamb-recipes/) for more options【3:4†source】. 2026-04-24T08:30:06.0732947Z     ## 烤箱烤羊排（最简单版）的做法  
2026-04-24T08:30:06.0733156Z     
2026-04-24T08:30:06.0733494Z     1.  先把羊排洗净，放孜然粉，花椒粉，蚝油，蛋清，洋葱1/4，料酒（红酒最好）两勺，味达美适量。用手使劲抓抓后盖保鲜膜腌制一小时以上。
2026-04-24T08:30:06.0733763Z         
2026-04-24T08:30:06.0734474Z         ![烤箱烤羊排（最简单版）的做法 步骤1](https://i2.chuimg.com/2c515fd4086211e7947d0242ac110002_1560w_2104h.jpg?imageView2/2/w/300/interlace/1/q/75)
2026-04-24T08:30:06.0735121Z     2.  烤盘用锡纸包好。最下层垫腌肉的洋葱，空处放土豆片（尽量切的薄一点），上面铺羊排（肉厚的那面朝上）。[烤箱](/category/40057/)220度，预热5分钟进炉。
2026-04-24T08:30:06.0735404Z         
2026-04-24T08:30:06.0735889Z         ![烤箱烤羊排（最简单版）的做法 步骤2](https://i2.chuimg.com/f0b7ba08086211e7bc9d0242ac110002_1560w_2104h.jpg?imageView2/2/w/300/interlace/1/q/75)
2026-04-24T08:30:06.0736495Z     3.  先220度上下火20分钟，拿出来上面刷一点点油（色拉油即可），撒孜然面，撒盐，爱吃辣的这会就要再撒辣椒面。不用翻动直接再进烤箱220度20分钟。
2026-04-24T08:30:06.0736768Z         
2026-04-24T08:30:06.0737215Z         ![烤箱烤羊排（最简单版）的做法 步骤3](https://i2.chuimg.com/cc35d24a086311e7bc9d0242ac110002_1560w_2104h.jpg?imageView2/2/w/300/interlace/1/q/75)
2026-04-24T08:30:06.0737680Z     4.  看着图片都能听见滋滋声了。
2026-04-24T08:30:06.0737869Z         
2026-04-24T08:30:06.0738342Z         ![烤箱烤羊排（最简单版）的做法 步骤4](https://i2.chuimg.com/4510ef6a086411e7947d0242ac110002_1560w_2104h.jpg?imageView2/2/w/300/interlace/1/q/75)
2026-04-24T08:30:06.0738757Z

Классический шашлык из баранины\n\n**Сайт:** EdimDoma.ru  \n**Ингредиенты:**  \n- Баранина — 1,5 кг (лучше мякоть из задней ноги, не убирать весь жир!)\n- Лук красный — 1,5 кг\n- Кинза — 1 пучок\n- Тмин — 1 ст. л.\n- Перец черный — 0,3 ч. л.\n- Кисломолочный напиток тан — 500 мл\n- Соль морская\n\n**Приготовление:**  \n1. Баранину нарезать большими кубиками для шашлыка.\n2. Лук нарезать кольцами, кинзу порубить.\n3. Слоями в контейнер выложить баранину, лук, посыпать тмином и перцем, залить таном.\n4. Мариновать минимум 2 часа.\n5. Нанизать мясо с луком на шампуры, жарить на мангале, периодически поливая маринадом.\n6. Солить уже готовое мясо, подавать с ткемали или свежими овощами.\n\nПошаговое фото и детали тут:  \nhttps://www.edimdoma.ru/retsepty/25102-shashlyk-iz-baraniny【3:0†source】\n\n---\n\n## 2. Шашлык из баранины, маринованный в йогурте/кефире\n\n**Сайт:** gotovim-doma.ru  \n**Ингредиенты:**  \n- Баранина (без жира, пленок, жил) — 1,8 кг\n- Натуральный йогурт или кефир — 1,8 кг\n- Оливковое масло — 0,5 чашки\n- Лимон (цедра и сок) — 2 ч.л. (цедра), 0,5 чашки сока (4 лимона)\n- Кинза — 1 пучок\n- Соль, перец, чеснок (4-5 долек)\n\n**Приготовление:**  \n1. Нарезать баранину кубиками по 4–5 см.\n2. Для маринада смешайте йогурт, масло, цедру и сок лимона, чеснок, соль, перец, кинзу.\n3. Выложить мясо слоями в маринаде и убрать в холодильник минимум на 4 часа, лучше — на ночь.\n4. Нанизать мясо на шампуры и жарить до готовности.\n\nПодробный рецепт и фото:  \nhttps://www.gotovim-doma.ru/recipe/6158-shashlyk-iz-baraniny-marinovannyy-v-jogurte【3:1†source】\n\n---\n\n## 3. Шашлык по-карски из баранины (с коньяком!)\n\n**Сайт:** EdimDoma.ru  \n**Ингредиенты:**  \n- Баранина — 500 г\n- Лук — 3 шт.\n- Коньяк — 50 мл\n- Соль, перец, специи по вкусу\n\n**Приготовление:**  \n1. Крупно нарезать мясо, натереть солью и перцем.\n2. Мелко нарезать лук, перемешать с мясом, добавить коньяк. Оставить на 5–6 часов.\n3. Нанизать на шампуры (можно добавить бараньи почки, помидоры или лук целиком) и жарить 25–30 минут на углях, поворачивая.\n4. Готовое мясо нарезать, подавать с зеленью и лавашом.\n\nДетали и тонкости классики:  \nhttps://www.edimdoma.ru/retsepty/164571-shashlyk-po-karski-iz-baraniny【3:6†source】\n\n---\n\nЕсли интересуют варианты стейка на гриле из баранины — такие рецепты встречаются реже как отдельная категория, но шашлык крупными кусками по вышеуказанным методикам можно приготовить именно формата \"стейков\" на решетке-гриль, а не только на шампурах. Если нужно именно пошагово для стейков, уточните — подберу дополнительно!","annotations":[{"text":"","start_index":906,"end_index":918,"url_citation":{"title":"Шашлык из баранины — Пошаговый рецепт приготовления с фото 2026 ...","url":"https://www.edimdoma.ru/retsepty/13146-shashlyk-iz-baraniny"}},{"text":"","start_index":1669,"end_index":1681,"url_citation":{"title":"Шашлык из баранины маринованный в йогурте (кефире) - пошаговый рецепт с ...","url":"https://gotovim-doma.ru/recipe/8770-shashlyk-iz-baraniny-marinovannyy-v-yogurte-kefire"}},{"text":"","start_index":2298,"end_index":2310,"url_citation":{"title":"Шашлык по-карски из баранины — классический рецепт с коньяком","url":"https://www.edimdoma.ru/retsepty/149632-shashlyk-po-karski"}}]},"bing_searches":[{"text":"рецепт шашлыка или стейка из баранины site:khachapuri.ru OR site:edimdoma.ru OR site:gotovim-doma.ru","url":"https://www.bing.com/search?q=%D1%80%D0%B5%D1%86%D0%B5%D0%BF%D1%82+%D1%88%D0%B0%D1%88%D0%BB%D1%8B%D0%BA%D0%B0+%D0%B8%D0%BB%D0%B8+%D1%81%D1%82%D0%B5%D0%B9%D0%BA%D0%B0+%D0%B8%D0%B7+%D0%B1%D0%B0%D1%80%D0%B0%D0%BD%D0%B8%D0%BD%D1%8B+site%3Akhachapuri.ru+OR+site%3Aedimdoma.ru+OR+site%3Agotovim-doma.ru"}],"annotations":null}

2026-04-24T08:31:10.2785135Z     ## Описание рецепта
2026-04-24T08:31:10.2785316Z     
2026-04-24T08:31:10.2786323Z     За мясом очень советую отправиться на рынок, для шашлыка лучше всего подойдет мякоть баранины из задней ноги. И не стремитесь срезать весь жир, именно он делает шашлык ароматным и сочным. Солить я предпочитаю уже готовое мясо — дело в том, что соль вытягивает из мяса влагу. При быстрой обжарке это не столь важно, но здесь мясо достаточно долго маринуется, поэтому посолите готовый шашлык хорошей морской солью. Подавать шашлык хорошо с соусом ткемали.

Thai Grilled Pork Jowl (คอหมูย่าง)**  \nThis is a classic Thai barbecue recipe featuring pork jowl, which is known for its rich flavor and juicy texture thanks to its fat content. The pork is marinated with garlic, white peppercorns, cilantro root or stems, lemongrass, palm sugar, coconut milk, oyster sauce, and soy sauce. After marinating, the pork jowl is grilled until smoky and slightly charred, then served with a traditional Isaan-style dipping sauce called \"Nam Jim Jeaw.\" This dish is often paired with sticky rice and papaya salad for a complete meal.  \n[Recipe details, video tutorial, and tips are all available on Hot Thai Kitchen's site]【3:0†source】.\n\n**2. Zubereitung und Zutaten findest du hier: Schweinsschulter, Zwiebel, Sauerkraut, Paprika, Knoblauch, Tomatenmark etc.【3:4†source】\n2. Steirisches Wurzelfleisch – mageres Schweinefleisch mit Wurzelgemüse gekocht. Ideal für bodenständige Hausmannskost.【3:8†source】\n\n**Rind:**\n- Beim Rezept \"Kohl auf Wiener Art\" wird, neben Wurst als Option, auch gekochtes Rindfleisch als perfekte Ergänzung empfohlen – das Gericht selbst ist für Beilagen geeignet und nicht zu deftig, etwa ideal mit gekochtem Tafelspitz.【3:6†source】\n- Für klassische Rindfleischgerichte kannst du auf den Seiten nach \"Rind\" oder \"Siedefleisch\" suchen.\n\n**Kombinierte Rezepte (Wurst, gemischt):**\n- Wurstknödel – Hier kann die Fülle aus verschiedenen Wurst- oder Fleischsorten wie z.B. Schwein, Rind oder Geselchtem bestehen【3:3†source】【3:5†source】\n- Brettljause – Verschiedene Wurst- und Fleischsorten auf Jausenbrett, meist von Schwein und Rind【3:0†source】\n- Wurstsalat – Meistens mit Rindfleischwurst, aber auch andere Sorten möglich【3:2†source】\n\nAlle genannten Rezepte sowie Variationen und noch mehr findest du mit den jeweiligen Suchbegriffen direkt auf den Plattformen. Bei ichkoche.at kannst du die Rezepte auch nach Fleischsorte filtern oder gezielt „Lamm“, „Schwein“ oder „Rind“ ins Suchfeld eingeben. 2026-04-24T08:31:43.8590685Z     ## Zubereitung
2026-04-24T08:31:43.8590858Z     
2026-04-24T08:31:43.8591038Z     1.  Zuerst ca. 1 l Wasser aufkochen.
2026-04-24T08:31:43.8591797Z     2.  Fleisch, Essig, Lorbeerblätter, Pfefferkörner, Wacholderbeeren, Knoblauch, Majoran, Salz und Natron hineingeben.
2026-04-24T08:31:43.8592634Z     3.  Mit Wasser auffüllen, bis alles bedeckt ist. 1 bis 1 1/2 Stunden köcheln.
2026-04-24T08:31:43.8593379Z     4.  Inzwischen Karotten, Gelbe Rüben, Sellerieknolle und Petersilwurzeln schälen, in feine Streifen schneiden. Den Lauch putzen und ebenfalls in feine Streifen schneiden.
2026-04-24T08:31:43.8594071Z     5.  Gemüse 15 Minuten vor Ende der Kochzeit zum Fleisch geben und alles weich kochen.
2026-04-24T08:31:43.8594757Z     6.  Fleisch aus dem Topf nehmen und in dünne Scheiben schneiden.
2026-04-24T08:31:43.8595478Z     7.  Das Fleisch auf tiefen Tellern mit dem Gemüse, etwas Sud, [Kümmelkartoffeln](/kuemmelkartoffeln-rezept-54 "Kümmelkartoffeln Rezept") und frisch geriebenem Kren anrichten.

2026-04-24T08:33:23.0894730Z     
2026-04-24T08:33:23.0895230Z     ![Cinghiale in umido](https://www.giallozafferano.it/images/292-29271/Cinghiale-in-umido_450x300.jpg)
2026-04-24T08:33:23.0896215Z     
2026-04-24T08:33:23.0900112Z     Il cinghiale in umido è un [secondo](https://www.giallozafferano.it/ricette-cat/Secondi-piatti/ "Secondi") piatto della cucina tradizionale, ricco e sostanzioso, perfetto per chi ama i sapori intensi. Il segreto di questa ricetta è la cottura lenta, che permette alla carne di [cinghiale](https://ricette.giallozafferano.it/ricette-con-il-Cinghiale/grandi-classici/ "Ricette con il cinghiale") di diventare tenera e di assorbire gli aromi dati dal [vino rosso](https://ricette.giallozafferano.it/ricette-con-Vino-rosso/ "Ricette con il vino rosso") e dalla cipolla, e i profumi dell’alloro e del rosmarino. Il risultato è una carne che si scioglie in bocca accompagnata da un sughetto denso e succulento. Personalizzare la ricetta è facile: per esempio, provate ad aggiungere funghi porcini o olive nere, per un tocco ancora più stuzzicante. Se poi siete degli amanti degli accostamenti particolari, aggiungete del cacao amaro nel sugo: gli conferirà un retrogusto profondo. Il cinghiale in umido è il piatto perfetto da servire per una cena in famiglia o con amici, magari accompagnato da un contorno di polenta o purè di patate.

2026-04-24T08:35:22.7244354Z     25. a real published book**. Training-data recall of "what a recipe roughly contains" is

2026-04-24T08:35:22.7248677Z     2.

2026-04-24T08:35:22.7249029Z     4. 
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7249192Z     5. | Field | Value |
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7249383Z     6. |-------|-------|

2026-04-24T08:35:22.7249794Z     8. | Cut type folder | `roasts/` |

2026-04-24T08:35:22.7251318Z     14. ## Cut profile
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7251504Z     15. 
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7251860Z     16. The lamb shank is the lower portion of the leg — the section below the knee joint on either
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7252337Z     17. the fore (front) or hind (back) leg. It contains a central bone surrounded by a dense network
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7252814Z     18. of collagen-rich connective tissue, which transforms into gelatin during prolonged moist-heat
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7253274Z     19. cooking and gives braised lamb shank its characteristic sticky, unctuous sauce and
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7253743Z     20. fall-off-the-bone texture. The shank has relatively little intramuscular fat compared with
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7254415Z     21. the shoulder but abundant surface and inter-muscular fat that melts into the braising liquid.
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7254893Z     22. Because of the high collagen content, the shank is uniquely unsuited to dry-heat methods
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7255443Z     23. — it must reach 85–95 °C internal temperature and be held there for 2–4 hours for collagen
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7255991Z     24. conversion to complete. Any reading below 80 °C will leave the meat tough regardless of cooking
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7256471Z     25. time. This makes the MEATER probe essential for monitoring approach to the braising window;
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7256959Z     26. the pull temperature is the **minimum** at which the meat has rendered sufficiently, not a
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7257443Z     27. precision target. The shank is universal across Mediterranean, Middle Eastern, Northern European,
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7257947Z     28. Central Asian, and Indian culinary traditions. Braising liquid varies from red or white wine
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7258679Z     29. (European), beer (Belgian/Scandinavian), cider (Norman/Swedish), saffron-tomato (Persian/Moroccan),
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7259175Z     30. to spiced yoghurt or lentil-thickened broth (Indian/Turkish).
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7259453Z     31. 
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7259624Z     32. ## Source recipes
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7259895Z     33. 
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7260296Z     34. ### 1. BBC Good Food — Braised Lamb Shanks (British tradition)
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7260782Z     35. **Source**: BBC Good Food, *bbcgoodfood.com/recipes/braised-lamb-shanks*
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7261118Z     36. (fetched 2026-04-24, author: Good Food magazine)
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7261495Z     37. **Serves**: 8 · **Prep**: 20 min · **Cook**: 2 hrs · **Rest**: 5 min
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7261756Z     38. 
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7261920Z     39. **Ingredients**
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7262113Z     40. - 8 lamb shanks
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7262437Z     41. - 2 tbsp olive oil
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7262651Z     42. - 1 onion, roughly chopped
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7262876Z     43. - 2 carrots, roughly chopped
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7263102Z     44. - Few sprigs fresh rosemary
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7263320Z     45. - 3 fresh bay leaves
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7263532Z     46. - 4 garlic cloves, left whole
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7263749Z     47. - 2 tbsp plain flour
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7263988Z     48. - 1 tbsp tomato purée
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7264357Z     49. - 350 ml white wine
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7264593Z     50. - 500 ml lamb or chicken stock
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7264799Z     51. 
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7264962Z     52. **Method**
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7265314Z     53. 1. Heat oven to 200 °C / fan 180 °C / gas 6. Pour the oil into a casserole dish or roasting
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7266115Z     54.    tray large enough to fit all the shanks. Over high heat on the hob, spend a good 10 minutes
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7266636Z     55.    browning the lamb all over.
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7266996Z     56. 2. Remove the lamb, add the onion and carrot and cook for 10 minutes until starting to brown.
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7267604Z     57.    Stir in the herbs and garlic and cook for a few minutes more. Stir in the flour and tomato
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7268054Z     58.    purée, season well, then pour over the wine and stock.
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7268369Z     59. 3. Return the lamb shanks to the pan. Bring to a simmer.
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7268759Z     60. 4. Insert the MEATER probe lengthways into the thickest part of the shank, keeping the tip
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7269598Z     61.    away from the central bone.
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7270076Z     62. 5. Cover with a lid or tightly with foil and cook in the oven, undisturbed, for 1½–2 hrs until
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7270421Z     63.    lamb is tender.
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7271089Z     64. 6. Remove the lamb from the sauce and set aside. Put the pan back on the hob and bubble the
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7271737Z     65.    sauce for a few minutes until thickened to a gravy consistency.
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7272237Z     66. 7. **Pull at 88–92 °C (190–198 °F)** — at this temperature the collagen has converted to
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7273003Z     67.    gelatin and the meat separates easily from the bone. The window is wide; holding at 90 °C
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7273739Z     68.    for 30 minutes produces more tender results than hitting 90 °C and immediately pulling.
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7274399Z     69. 8. Final serving temperature: **88–92 °C / 190–198 °F** (braised — collagen fully rendered,
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7275090Z     70.    meat falling from bone).
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7275391Z     71. 
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7275609Z     72. ---
2026-04-24T08:35:22.7275831Z     73.

2026-04-24T08:35:27.7227199Z     98. 1. Put 3 tablespoons of the oil into a very large, wide, heavy-bottomed pan and warm over medium
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7228121Z     99.    heat. Brown the lamb shanks in batches and then remove to a roasting tin to rest temporarily.
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7228822Z     100. 2. Peel the onions and garlic and process in a food processor or chop finely by hand. Add the
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7229544Z     101.    remaining oil to the pan, and fry the onion-garlic mush until soft, sprinkling salt over to
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7230260Z     102.    stop it catching. Stir in the turmeric, ground ginger, chilli, cinnamon and nutmeg, and
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7230781Z     103.    season with freshly ground pepper.
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7231215Z     104. 3. Stir again, adding the honey, soy sauce and Marsala.
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7231830Z     105. 4. Put the shanks back in the pan. Insert the MEATER probe lengthways into the thickest part
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7232440Z     106.    of the largest shank, tip clear of the bone.
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7233022Z     107. 5. Add cold water almost to cover. Bring to the boil, then put a lid on the pan, lower the heat
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7233802Z     108.    and simmer very gently for 1–1½ hours or until the meat is tender.
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7234634Z     109. 6. Add the red lentils and cook for about 20 minutes longer without the lid, until the lentils
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7235261Z     110.    have softened into the sauce and the juices have reduced and thickened slightly.
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7236037Z     111. 7. **Pull at 90–95 °C (194–203 °F).** The lentil-thickened sauce signals doneness as much as
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7236729Z     112.    the temperature; at 90 °C the meat should pull freely from the bone.
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7237286Z     113. 8. Toast the nuts in a dry frying pan; sprinkle onto the lamb as you serve it.
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7238036Z     114. 9. Final serving temperature: **90–95 °C / 194–203 °F** (fully braised, fall-off-bone).
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7238523Z     115.

2026-04-24T08:35:27.7239555Z     118. ### 3. Suzy Karadsheh — Mediterranean Braised Lamb Shanks (Mediterranean / Egyptian tradition)
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7240168Z     119. **Source**: Suzy Karadsheh, *The Mediterranean Dish*;
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7240689Z     120. themediterraneandish.com/braised-lamb-shanks/ (fetched 2026-04-24)
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7241369Z     121. **Serves**: 6 · **Prep**: 20 min · **Cook**: 2½ hrs · **Oven**: 175 °C (350 °F)
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7241781Z     122. 
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7242005Z     123. **Ingredients**
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7242276Z     124. - 6 lamb shanks
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7242595Z     125. - 2¼ tsp garlic powder
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7242896Z     126. - 1 tsp sweet Spanish paprika
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7243219Z     127. - 1 tsp kosher salt
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7243520Z     128. - 1 tsp freshly ground black pepper
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7243900Z     129. - ¾ tsp ground nutmeg
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7244568Z     130. - 2 tbsp extra virgin olive oil
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7244949Z     131. - 1 medium yellow onion, roughly chopped
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7245319Z     132. - 2 celery ribs, roughly chopped
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7245728Z     133. - 3 large carrots, peeled and cut into large pieces
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7246108Z     134. - 450 g (1 lb) baby potatoes
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7246419Z     135. - 2 cups red wine
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7246695Z     136. - 3 cups beef broth
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7247022Z     137. - 1 can (800 g / 28 oz) peeled tomatoes
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7247358Z     138. - 2 cinnamon sticks
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7247647Z     139. - 4 sprigs fresh thyme
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7247949Z     140. - 2 sprigs fresh rosemary
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7248246Z     141. 
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7248473Z     142. **Method**
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7249043Z     143. 1. Preheat oven to 175 °C (350 °F). Mix garlic powder, paprika, salt, pepper and nutmeg. Pat
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7249657Z     144.    the lamb shanks dry and season all over with the spice mix.
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7250405Z     145. 2. In a large Dutch oven over medium-high, heat 2 tbsp olive oil. Working in batches, brown
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7251099Z     146.    the shanks until golden on all sides (about 8 minutes). Transfer to a large tray.
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7251782Z     147. 3. Pour off excess fat and return pot to medium-high heat. Add onions, celery, carrots and
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7252513Z     148.    potatoes. Sauté until the vegetables gain some colour, 5–7 minutes.
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7253166Z     149. 4. Add red wine and scrape up the brown bits from the bottom. Cook briefly until wine reduces
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7253893Z     150.    slightly, then add beef broth, peeled tomatoes, cinnamon sticks, thyme and rosemary.
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7254777Z     151.    Sprinkle salt and pepper. Return lamb shanks to the pot; press down to submerge. Boil
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7255333Z     152.    10 minutes, then turn off the heat.
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7255920Z     153. 5. Insert the MEATER probe lengthways into the thickest shank, keeping the tip away from the
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7256475Z     154.    central bone.
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7257077Z     155. 6. Cover the pot and transfer to the hot oven for 2½ hours. Check periodically; add more liquid
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7257603Z     156.    if needed.
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7258153Z     157. 7. **Pull at 88–93 °C (190–200 °F).** The cooking liquid will have reduced to about one-third
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7258866Z     158.    of the original volume. The meat should pull away from the bone with light tong pressure.
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7259567Z     159. 8. Serve on Lebanese rice, polenta or orzo with the vegetables and braising sauce.
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7260372Z     160. 9. Final serving temperature: **88–93 °C / 190–200 °F** (Mediterranean braise, fall-off-bone).
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7260900Z     161. 
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7261122Z     162. ---
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7261344Z     163. 
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7261978Z     164. ### 4. Matprat.no — Hvitvinbraiserte lammeskanker / White-Wine Braised Lamb Shanks (Norwegian tradition)
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7263012Z     165. **Source**: Matprat.no (Norwegian Meat and Poultry Research Centre / Opplysningskontoret for egg og kjøtt);
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7263835Z     166. matprat.no/oppskrifter/gjester/hvitvinsbraiserte-lammeskanker/ (fetched 2026-04-24)
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7264629Z     167. **Serves**: 4 · **Cook**: 3½–4 hrs · **Oven**: 150 °C
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7264987Z     168. 
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7265194Z     169. **Ingredients**
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7265463Z     170. - 4 lamb shanks
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7265724Z     171. - 1 tsp salt
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7266042Z     172. - ½ tsp pepper
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7266346Z     173. - 2 cloves garlic
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7266712Z     174. - 1 red or yellow capsicum (paprika), cut into sticks
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7267109Z     175. - 3 green chillies
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7267410Z     176. - 2 sprigs fresh rosemary
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7268073Z     177. - 2 tbsp rosé-pepper / pink peppercorns
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7268461Z     178. - 750 ml (7.5 dl) white wine
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7268825Z     179. - Salt and pepper (additional, to taste)
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7269216Z     180. - 8 green asparagus spears (to serve)
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7269582Z     181. - 4 sprigs fresh basil (to garnish)
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7269906Z     182. 
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7270133Z     183. **Method**
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7270525Z     184. 1. Rub the lamb shanks with salt and pepper. Place in an ovenproof form.
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7271182Z     185. 2. Peel the garlic and cut the capsicum into sticks. Add the garlic, capsicum, chilli and
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7272039Z     186.    rosemary to the form alongside the shanks. Sprinkle with rosé pepper and pour over the
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7272583Z     187.    white wine.
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7273149Z     188. 3. Cover tightly with aluminium foil and cook in the oven at 150 °C for 3½–4 hours, or until
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7273711Z     189.    the meat loosens from the bones.
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7274592Z     190. 4. Insert the MEATER probe lengthways into the thickest shank, tip away from bone.
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7275340Z     191. 5. Optional: remove the foil for the last few minutes and raise oven to high grill (overvarme)
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7275889Z     192.    to add colour to the shanks.
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7276436Z     193. 6. Remove the capsicum and chilli pieces from the cooking juices. Strain the juices; return
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7277171Z     194.    capsicum and chilli. Use a hand blender to create a full-bodied sauce. Season to taste.
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7277886Z     195. 7. Peel the asparagus; cook in lightly salted water for 3 minutes, until just tender.
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7278719Z     196. 8. **Pull at 88–92 °C (190–198 °F).** Norwegian culinary tradition cooks lamb shanks until
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7279526Z     197.    they fall from the bone; the low oven temperature (150 °C) extends the collagen-conversion
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7280147Z     198.    window and produces an exceptionally silky sauce.
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7280733Z     199. 9. Pour sauce into deep plates; place one lamb shank per plate. Garnish with basil and the
2026-04-24T08:35:27.7281287Z     200.    lightly cooked green asparagus.
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3231617Z

2026-04-24T08:35:40.3232272Z   name: view

2026-04-24T08:35:40.3238192Z     200.    lightly cooked green asparagus.
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3238897Z     201. 10. Final serving temperature: **88–92 °C / 190–198 °F** (fully braised, Scandinavian style).
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3239260Z     202.

2026-04-24T08:35:40.3240056Z     205. ### 5. Kasimir (Chefkoch.de) — Geschmorte Lammhaxen / Red-Wine Braised Lamb Shanks (German tradition)
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3240499Z     206. **Source**: Kasimir, Chefkoch.de community recipe;
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3240888Z     207. chefkoch.de/rezepte/566811155129665/Geschmorte-Lammhaxen.html (fetched 2026-04-24;
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3241241Z     208. 4.8/5 stars from 55 ratings)
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3241629Z     209. **Serves**: 4 · **Prep**: 45 min (+overnight marination) · **Cook**: 2½ hrs
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3241926Z     210. 
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3242100Z     211. **Ingredients**
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3242312Z     212. - 4 lamb shanks (Lammhaxen)
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3242585Z     213. - 2 carrots (Möhren)
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3242845Z     214. - 1 large onion (Gemüsezwiebel)
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3243080Z     215. - 1 garlic clove (Knoblauchzehe)
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3243583Z     216. - Tomato paste (Tomatenmark), a little
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3243840Z     217. - 1 glass lamb stock (Lammfond)
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3244091Z     218. - 200 g sieved tomatoes (passierte Tomaten)
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3244513Z     219. - 250 ml red wine (Rotwein)
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3244725Z     220. - Olive oil
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3244936Z     221. - A splash balsamic vinegar (Balsamico)
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3245216Z     222. - 1 bunch flat-leaf parsley (glatte Petersilie)
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3245472Z     223. - Salt and pepper
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3245680Z     224. - Thyme, dried or fresh
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3245899Z     225. - Rosemary, dried or fresh
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3246168Z     226. - Cayenne pepper or Pul Biber (Turkish chilli flakes)
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3246460Z     227. - 1 knife-tip ground cinnamon (Zimt)
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3246768Z     228. - 1 knife-tip ground cumin (Kreuzkümmel)
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3246999Z     229. 
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3247163Z     230. **Method**
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3247487Z     231. 1. The day before: trim the shanks of excess fat and sinews. Rub all over with thyme, rosemary,
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3248177Z     232.    olive oil, salt and pepper. Refrigerate overnight — the dry-rub penetrates the meat and
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3248564Z     233.    improves both flavour and crust formation.
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3248940Z     234. 2. The next day: brown the shanks all over in olive oil in a heavy braising pot. Remove and
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3249469Z     235.    set aside. Dice the onion, garlic and carrots; sauté in the same pot until beginning to
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3249860Z     236.    colour. Stir in the tomato paste and cook briefly.
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3250256Z     237. 3. Deglaze with red wine and reduce slightly. Add the sieved tomatoes and half the lamb stock.
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3250795Z     238.    Season with a knife-tip each of cumin and cinnamon — these must be barely perceptible; if
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3251182Z     239.    they taste of spice the sauce is over-spiced.
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3251634Z     240. 4. Return the shanks to the pot, add a lid and braise over low heat for approximately 2½ hours.
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3252015Z     241.    Add more lamb stock if needed during cooking.
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3252397Z     242. 5. Insert the MEATER probe lengthways into the thickest shank, tip away from the central bone.
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3252870Z     243. 6. After cooking, remove the shanks and rest on a plate. Taste the sauce; adjust with cayenne
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3253326Z     244.    or Pul Biber for heat, and a splash of balsamic vinegar to round. No additional thickening
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3253780Z     245.    is needed — the reduced braising liquid is naturally concentrated.
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3254143Z     246. 7. Stir in freshly chopped flat-leaf parsley before serving.
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3254806Z     247. 8. **Pull at 88–93 °C (190–200 °F).** The German tradition uses no additional binding — the
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3255277Z     248.    collagen in the shanks provides sufficient body. The author notes that serving with couscous
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3255676Z     249.    and salad is traditional in his household.
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3256105Z     250. 9. Final serving temperature: **88–93 °C / 190–200 °F** (fully braised, German style).
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3256428Z     251. 
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3256597Z     252. ---
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3256767Z     253. 
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3257116Z     254. ### 6. Tasteline.com — Ugnsstekt lammlägg / Oven-braised Lamb Shank (Swedish tradition)
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3257623Z     255. **Source**: *Det moderna köket* (The Modern Kitchen), recipe published on Tasteline.com;
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3258076Z     256. tasteline.com/recept/ugnsstekt-lammlagg/ (fetched 2026-04-24; 3.3/5 stars, 300 votes)
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3258526Z     257. **Serves**: 7 · **Prep**: 15 min · **Cook**: 2 hrs · **Oven**: 150 °C
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3258815Z     258. 
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3258990Z     259. **Ingredients**
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3259228Z     260. - 7 lamb shanks (lammlägg)
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3259631Z     261. - 750 ml (7.5 dl) meat stock (köttbuljong)
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3259931Z     262. - 250 ml (2.5 dl) red wine (rött vin)
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3260161Z     263. - 6 bay leaves (lagerblad)
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3260422Z     264. - 4 garlic cloves (vitlöksklyftor)
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3260685Z     265. - 8 small onions (smålökar)
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3260915Z     266. - 2 sprigs rosemary (rosmarin)
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3261145Z     267. - 3 sprigs marjoram (mejram)
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3261381Z     268. - 1 tbsp peppercorns (pepparkorn)
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3261606Z     269. 
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3261770Z     270. **Method**
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3262082Z     271. 1. Set a frying pan on high heat. Add the lamb shanks and sear for approximately 2 minutes per
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3262610Z     272.    side, or until well browned. No oil is specified — the shanks render their own fat in a hot
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3262947Z     273.    dry pan.
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3263271Z     274. 2. Transfer the browned shanks to a roasting tin. Add the stock, wine, bay leaves, garlic,
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3263804Z     275.    small whole onions, rosemary, marjoram and peppercorns to the tin.
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3264458Z     276. 3. Insert the MEATER probe lengthways into the largest shank, tip away from the central bone.
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3265284Z     277. 4. Cover the tin tightly with foil and oven-braise at 150 °C for approximately 2 hours, or
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3265936Z     278.    until the meat is very tender (mycket mört).
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3266426Z     279. 5. **Pull at 88–90 °C (190–194 °F).** Swedish home-cooking tradition aims for complete
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3266943Z     280.    tenderness rather than a specific pull temperature; the 2-hour window at 150 °C is designed
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3267311Z     281.    to achieve this reliably.
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3267645Z     282. 6. Serve the shanks in deep bowls with polenta or potato-and-garlic mash (potatis- och
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3268045Z     283.    vitlöksmos).
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3268529Z     284. 7. Final serving temperature: **88–90 °C / 190–194 °F** (fully braised, Scandinavian home
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3269089Z     285.    cooking style, from *Det moderna köket*).
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3269453Z     286. 
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3269665Z     287. ---
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3269889Z     288. 
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3270131Z     289. ## Temperature consensus
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3270358Z     290. 
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3270547Z     291. | Source | Pull temperature | Method |
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3270791Z     292. |--------|----------------|--------|
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3271167Z     293. | BBC Good Food (UK) | 88–92 °C | Oven braise, white wine, 1½–2 hrs at 200 °C |
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3271587Z     294. | Nigella Lawson (UK) | 90–95 °C | Stovetop simmer, aromatic broth |
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3272046Z     295. | The Mediterranean Dish (Egypt/US) | 88–93 °C | Dutch oven, 2½ hrs at 175 °C |
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3272543Z     296. | Matprat.no (Norway) | 88–92 °C | Foil-covered form, white wine, 3½–4 hrs at 150 °C |
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3273025Z     297. | Chefkoch.de / Kasimir (Germany) | 88–93 °C | Covered braise, red wine, 2½ hrs |
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3273579Z     298. | Tasteline.com / Det moderna köket (Sweden) | 88–90 °C | Covered roasting tin, red wine + stock, 2 hrs at 150 °C |
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3273958Z     299. 
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3274501Z     300. **Consensus pull**: **88–95 °C (190–203 °F)**. The braise window is wide — collagen begins
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3275035Z     301. converting to gelatin at around 72–74 °C but full texture transformation requires sustained
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3275554Z     302. time above 80 °C. All six traditions agree on a minimum of approximately 88 °C. Higher
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3276082Z     303. temperatures (up to 95 °C) are acceptable and produce softer, more yielding meat. Overshooting
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3276551Z     304. to 100 °C risks drying out the outer muscle fibres in longer braises.
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3276837Z     305. 
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3277323Z     306. **Representative coding value**: **90 °C (194 °F)** as the nominal pull, with a practical
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3277713Z     307. range of 88–95 °C.
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3277912Z     308. 
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3278092Z     309. ## Notes for cooking_data.py
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3278301Z     310. 
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3278475Z     311. - `doneness`: `braised_tender`
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3278702Z     312. - `pull_temp_c`: 90
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3278921Z     313. - `pull_temp_range_c`: [88, 95]
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3279236Z     314. - `safety_level`: `safe` (well above all pathogen destruction thresholds)
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3279680Z     315. - Collagen conversion is time-dependent as well as temperature-dependent. The MEATER probe
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3280276Z     316.   temperature reading marks entry into the braising window; actual tenderness depends on
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3281064Z     317.   the duration at that temperature. Recommend a minimum hold time of 30–45 minutes after
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3281748Z     318.   reaching 88 °C.
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3289873Z     319. - All six traditions sear the shanks before braising for Maillard flavour development.
2026-04-24T08:35:40.3290658Z     320. - All six use covered cooking vessels (lid, foil) to maintain steam and prevent evaporation.

2026-04-24T08:36:18.7935001Z     148. 
2026-04-24T08:36:18.7935188Z     149. ## Protocol for using working sources
2026-04-24T08:36:18.7935411Z     150. 
2026-04-24T08:36:18.7935579Z     151. ### Finding a correct URL
2026-04-24T08:36:18.7935903Z     152. 1. Run `web_search` with `site:{domain} {recipe-name}` to find the actual URL slug.
2026-04-24T08:36:18.7936293Z     153. 2. Confirm the slug in the search result annotations/citations.
2026-04-24T08:36:18.7936642Z     154. 3. Use `web_fetch` on the discovered URL to retrieve actual content.
2026-04-24T08:36:18.7937049Z     155. 4. If content matches the expected recipe, cite it. If content is wrong, try another URL.
2026-04-24T08:36:18.7937565Z     156. 
2026-04-24T08:36:18.7937801Z     157. ### Chefkoch.de URL discovery
2026-04-24T08:36:18.7938098Z     158. ```
2026-04-24T08:36:18.7938406Z     159. web_search: site:chefkoch.de lammhaxen geschmort rezept
2026-04-24T08:36:18.7939109Z     160. → finds: https://www.chefkoch.de/rezepte/566811155129665/Geschmorte-Lammhaxen.html
2026-04-24T08:36:18.7939576Z     161. → web_fetch that URL → confirmed recipe content
2026-04-24T08:36:18.7939822Z     162. ```
2026-04-24T08:36:18.7940020Z     163. 
2026-04-24T08:36:18.7940271Z     164. ### Tasteline.com URL discovery
2026-04-24T08:36:18.7940587Z     165. ```
2026-04-24T08:36:18.7940900Z     166. web_search: site:tasteline.com havsabborre recept
2026-04-24T08:36:18.7941471Z     167. → finds: https://www.tasteline.com/recept/hel-saltbakad-havsabborre-med-pepparrot-och-rakor/
2026-04-24T08:36:18.7942026Z     168. → web_fetch that URL → confirmed recipe content (or 404 if recipe removed)
2026-04-24T08:36:18.7942435Z     169. ```
2026-04-24T08:36:18.7942641Z     170.
2026-04-24T08:37:12.0722914Z
